content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "你現在做什麼工作？",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你現在做什麼工作？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ xiànzài zuò shénme gōngzuò?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 xian4zai4 zuo4 shen2me gong1zuo4?",
          "translation_en": "What job do you do now?",
          "translation_ko": "지금 무슨 일을 하세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我在一間公司上班，是兼職的工讀生。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ zài yī jiān gōngsī shàngbān, shì jiānzhí de gōngdúshēng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 zai4 yi1 jian1 gong1si1 shang4ban1, shi4 jian1zhi2 de gong1du2sheng1.",
          "translation_en": "I work at a company as a part-time student worker.",
          "translation_ko": "저는 한 회사에서 아르바이트로 일하고 있어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你的老闆好嗎？同事呢？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ de lǎobǎn hǎo ma? Tóngshì ne?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 de lao3ban3 hao3 ma? Tong2shi4 ne?",
          "translation_en": "Is your boss nice? And your colleagues?",
          "translation_ko": "사장님은 좋으세요? 동료들은요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "老闆很友善，同事也都很幫忙。",
          "pinyin": "Lǎobǎn hěn yǒushàn, tóngshì yě dōu hěn bāngmáng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Lao3ban3 hen3 you3shan4, tong2shi4 ye3 dou1 hen3 bang1mang2.",
          "translation_en": "The boss is very friendly, and the colleagues are all very helpful.",
          "translation_ko": "사장님은 매우 친절하시고, 동료들도 모두 잘 도와줘요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "那你的薪水怎麼樣？",
          "pinyin": "Nà nǐ de xīnshuǐ zěnme yàng?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Na4 ni3 de xin1shui3 zen3me yang4?",
          "translation_en": "How about your salary?",
          "translation_ko": "그럼 급여는 어떤가요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "薪水還可以，不過我打算以後找全職的工作。",
          "pinyin": "Xīnshuǐ hái kěyǐ, bùguò wǒ dǎsuàn yǐhòu zhǎo quánzhí de gōngzuò.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Xin1shui3 hai2 ke3yi3, bu2guo4 wo3 da3suan4 yi3hou4 zhao3 quan2zhi2 de gong1zuo4.",
          "translation_en": "The salary is okay, but I plan to find a full-time job later.",
          "translation_ko": "급여는 괜찮은데, 나중에 정규직을 찾을 생각이에요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What kind of job does B have now?",
          "question_ko": "B는 지금 어떤 일을 하고 있습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Full-time job", "Part-time student worker", "Internship"],
          "options_ko": ["정규직", "아르바이트", "인턴십"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the tones of 兼職 and 薪水.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Tell me about your job or your ideal job. Use words like 全職, 兼職, 薪水, and 老闆."
    },
    {
      "title": "學生的時間表",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你這個學期修幾門課？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ zhège xuéqī xiū jǐ mén kè?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 zhe4ge xue2qi1 xiu1 ji3 men2 ke4?",
          "translation_en": "How many courses are you taking this semester?",
          "translation_ko": "이번 학기에 몇 과목을 수강하세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我修了五門課，都是必修的。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ xiū le wǔ mén kè, dōu shì bìxiū de.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 xiu1 le5 wu3 men2 ke4, dou1 shi4 bi4xiu1 de.",
          "translation_en": "I'm taking five courses, all required.",
          "translation_ko": "다섯 과목을 수강하는데, 모두 필수 과목이에요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "功課多嗎？考試多嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Gōngkè duō ma? Kǎoshì duō ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Gong1ke4 duo1 ma? Kao3shi4 duo1 ma?",
          "translation_en": "Is there a lot of homework? Are there many exams?",
          "translation_ko": "숙제가 많나요? 시험도 많나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "功課很多，每個星期都有作業和報告。",
          "pinyin": "Gōngkè hěn duō, měi ge xīngqī dōu yǒu zuòyè hé bàogào.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Gong1ke4 hen3 duo1, mei3 ge xing1qi1 dou1 you3 zuo4ye4 he2 bao4gao4.",
          "translation_en": "There's a lot of homework; every week there are assignments and reports.",
          "translation_ko": "숙제가 많아요. 매주 과제와 보고서가 있어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "那你怎麼安排時間？",
          "pinyin": "Nà nǐ zěnme ānpái shíjiān?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Na4 ni3 zen3me an1pai2 shi2jian1?",
          "translation_en": "So how do you manage your time?",
          "translation_ko": "그럼 시간은 어떻게 관리하세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我每天早上先做功課，下午再去上課。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ měitiān zǎoshang xiān zuò gōngkè, xiàwǔ zài qù shàngkè.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 mei3tian1 zao3shang4 xian1 zuo4 gong1ke4, xia4wu3 zai4 qu4 shang4ke4.",
          "translation_en": "Every morning I do my homework first, then go to class in the afternoon.",
          "translation_ko": "매일 아침에 먼저 숙제를 하고, 오후에 수업을 들으러 가요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "How many courses is B taking this semester?",
          "question_ko": "B는 이번 학기에 몇 과목을 수강합니까?",
          "options_en": ["Three", "Four", "Five"],
          "options_ko": ["세 과목", "네 과목", "다섯 과목"],
          "correct_index": 2
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence, paying attention to the pronunciation of 必修 and 報告.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Describe your school schedule. Use words like 學期, 必修, 作業, and 安排."
    },
    {
      "title": "忙碌的一週",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你這個星期很忙嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ zhège xīngqī hěn máng ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 zhe4ge xing1qi1 hen3 mang2 ma?",
          "translation_en": "Are you busy this week?",
          "translation_ko": "이번 주에 많이 바쁘세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "對，我每天都要加班，因為下星期有重要的報告。",
          "pinyin": "Duì, wǒ měitiān dōu yào jiābān, yīnwèi xià xīngqī yǒu zhòngyào de bàogào.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Dui4, wo3 mei3tian1 dou1 yao4 jia1ban1, yin1wei4 xia4 xing1qi1 you3 zhong4yao4 de bao4gao4.",
          "translation_en": "Yes, I have to work overtime every day because there's an important report next week.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 매일 야근해야 해요. 다음 주에 중요한 보고서가 있어서요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "那你週末也要上班嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Nà nǐ zhōumò yě yào shàngbān ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Na4 ni3 zhou1mo4 ye3 yao4 shang4ban1 ma?",
          "translation_en": "So do you have to work on weekends too?",
          "translation_ko": "그럼 주말에도 출근해야 하나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "不用，週末我打算好好休息。",
          "pinyin": "Bùyòng, zhōumò wǒ dǎsuàn hǎohao xiūxi.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Bu4yong4, zhou1mo4 wo3 da3suan4 hao3hao xiu1xi.",
          "translation_en": "No, I plan to rest well on the weekend.",
          "translation_ko": "아니요, 주말에는 푹 쉴 생각이에요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "那你的同事也加班嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Nà nǐ de tóngshì yě jiābān ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Na4 ni3 de tong2shi4 ye3 jia1ban1 ma?",
          "translation_en": "Do your colleagues also work overtime?",
          "translation_ko": "그럼 동료분들도 야근하나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "對，我們部門的同事都一起加班。",
          "pinyin": "Duì, wǒmen bùmén de tóngshì dōu yīqǐ jiābān.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Dui4, wo3men bu4men2 de tong2shi4 dou1 yi4qi3 jia1ban1.",
          "translation_en": "Yes, all the colleagues in my department work overtime together.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 저희 부서 동료들이 다 같이 야근해요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "Why does B have to work overtime every day?",
          "question_ko": "B가 매일 야근해야 하는 이유는 무엇입니까?",
          "options_en": ["Because of a meeting", "Because of an important report", "Because of a part-time job"],
          "options_ko": ["회의 때문에", "중요한 보고서 때문에", "아르바이트 때문에"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence, focusing on the tones of 加班 and 報告.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Tell me about a busy week you had. Use words like 加班, 報告, 部門, and 休息."
    }
  ]
}
